description: Environment diagnostics (doctor), self-update state/check/upgrade (update), and audit.json reader (audit_cmd). audit_cmd is the admin-agent-facing read-only CLI for CS-produced audit artifacts

key_classes_functions.name: WEECHAT_PLUGIN_URL
key_classes_functions.purpose: GitHub raw URL for zchat.py WeeChat plugin

key_classes_functions.name: _VERSION_CMDS
key_classes_functions.purpose: Registry of --version flags per external tool

key_classes_functions.name: run_doctor
key_classes_functions.purpose: Iterate required+optional checks (uv/python/zellij/claude/channel/ergo/weechat/plugin/pytest/port/submodules), print status, exit 1 if required missing

key_classes_functions.name: setup_weechat
key_classes_functions.purpose: Download zchat.py plugin to WeeChat autoload dir

key_classes_functions.name: UPDATE_STATE_FILE / _ZCHAT_REPO / _CHANNEL_REPO
key_classes_functions.purpose: Constants for update check state + remote repos

key_classes_functions.name: should_check_today
key_classes_functions.purpose: Compare last_check date to today UTC

key_classes_functions.name: _check_remote_git / _check_remote_pypi
key_classes_functions.purpose: git ls-remote for main/dev branches; pypi JSON for release

key_classes_functions.name: check_for_updates
key_classes_functions.purpose: Update remote_ref for zchat+channel_server; compute update_available

key_classes_functions.name: _build_install_args / run_upgrade
key_classes_functions.purpose: `uv tool install --force` with rollback on failure

public_interface: load_update_state, save_update_state, should_check_today, check_for_updates, run_upgrade, UPDATE_STATE_FILE (update.py)
